message:
chore(tests): refresh CI test report artifacts with latest suite run timestamps

Updates all committed test report baselines to reflect the most recent full
suite execution. No schema or structural changes — only timestamp updates
and one status improvement:

tests/cross_platform_reports/linux/:
- platform_events.jsonl: timestamps updated from 11:00:43 → 13:32:34 UTC
- platform_report.json: generated_at timestamp updated; evidence_bundle check
  status improved from "skip" to "pass" (evidence bundle now present on disk);
  summary.passed 9→10, summary.skipped 1→0
- platform_report.md: generated_at and summary line updated to match

tests/ext_conformance/reports/:
- CONFORMANCE_REPORT.md: generated_at timestamp refresh
- conformance_summary.json: generated_at timestamp refresh

tests/full_suite_gate/:
- artifact_retention_report.json: timestamp refresh
- certification_events.jsonl: all event timestamps updated
- certification_report.md: generated_at timestamp refresh
- certification_verdict.json: timestamp and run_id refresh
- full_suite_events.jsonl: all event timestamps updated
- full_suite_report.md: generated_at timestamp refresh
- full_suite_verdict.json: timestamp refresh
- preflight_verdict.json: timestamp refresh
- waiver_audit.json: timestamp refresh

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
